_comment_template: Copy this file to {slug}.json and fill in the fields you want to curate. Delete any keys you don't want to set — partial curation is fine.
first_delivery_outcome_rationale: One-paragraph plain-language explanation of why this outcome was assigned. Future you (or AutoBuilder-Maintenance) will read this to decide whether to amend.
notes: Free-form text the dashboard can render alongside the run summary. Useful for the 'we re-prompted three times to get the layout right' kind of context that the substrate doesn't capture.

events.source_file: optional pointer; can be null for memory-curated events

revisions.summary: Short description of the follow-up step
revisions.rationale: Why this step was needed; what it fixed.

deliverable_kind: (optional override) web_app | plugin | cli | library | document | data | other
live_url: (optional explicit override; otherwise composed from codex/data/config.json)
